---
name: 🔄 Pull Request
about: Submit changes for review and merge
---

## 📋 Description

Brief description of what this PR does and why it's needed.

- What problem does it solve?
- What changes are included?
- Any breaking changes or migration notes?

---

## 🔗 Related Issues

Link to related issues:

- Closes #___
- Related to #___

---

## 🧪 Testing

Describe how you tested your changes:

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] Tested on multiple platforms (if applicable)

### Test Results

```bash
# Run tests
cargo test

# Output summary
```

---

## ✅ Checklist

Before requesting review, ensure:

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines (`cargo fmt`)
- [ ] No clippy warnings (`cargo clippy`)
- [ ] All tests pass (`cargo test`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Changes are minimal and focused
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and conventional
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added
- [ ] Breaking changes are clearly documented

---

## 📚 Documentation

If this PR introduces new features or changes behavior:

- [ ] README updated
- [ ] Architecture docs updated
- [ ] Examples added/updated
- [ ] FAQ updated if needed

---

## 🖼️ Screenshots / Output (if applicable)

For CLI or UI changes, include example output:

```
Paste output or screenshot description here
```

---

## 📝 Additional Notes

Any additional context for reviewers:

- Design decisions
- Performance considerations
- Security implications
- Future improvements

---

Points to focus on during review:

- 
-

Thank you for contributing to Fayd Protocol! 🌊

> 💡 **Tip**: Keep PRs small and focused. Smaller PRs get reviewed faster and are easier to maintain
